---
title: "debug_env.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\debug_env.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 2
logic_score: 9.13
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.20
---

## Intent
The `debug_env.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
